intro: Amauropelta heteroptera, also known as the 'South American shield fern', is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of South America. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of Amauropelta heteroptera include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and polysaccharides, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
